pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh copying the NASA GSFC sample file UITfuv2582gc.fits to uit_galaxy_sample.fits
Confirmed via task.json prompt instructions and export_result.sh checks
Confirmed via task.json prompt instructions and export_result.sh checks

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real NASA UIT galaxy sample FITS file (target object NGC 4151, originating from UITfuv2582gc.fits at fits.gsfc.nasa.gov), renamed to uit_galaxy_sample.fits. The expected output measurements are exported to galaxy_morphology.csv and a text summary is saved to morphology_report.txt.
